li.font: The Granularity Dilemma: Hybrid Control and Latent Planning
Environmental Uncertainty: Sim-to-Real and Model-Based RL
Value Alignment: From Pixel Fidelity to Semantic Perception
Engineering Constraints: Real-Time Deployment and Stability
